title: BLOCK 2 FINAL: Extension mastery
description: Block 2 final — 55 WPM on a pop-culture-flavored paragraph
text: Last night's stream hit 50K viewers — biggest yet! Big thanks to the squad, the mods, and everyone who showed up. Next session: Saturday at 8 PM. Drop a follow if you're new, and let's keep this energy going!
